subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O my God! This is Thy servant who hath believed in Thee and loved Thy loved ones and turned away from Thine enemies [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک اللهم یا الهی هذا عبدک الذی آمن بک و احب احبائک و اعرض عن اعدائک و
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for protection, @belief and denial, @love of God
